---
name: Conformance gap
about: Report that the spec is unimplementable, or that a conformance test is missing or wrong
title: "[conformance] "
labels: ["conformance"]
---

## Conformance level

Which level does this affect? (VCP-L0 / L1 / L2 / L3 / L4 — see `SPECIFICATION.md` §17)

## Test reference

If this is about the §18 security test suite, which test number? (1–12)

## Gap description

What cannot be implemented as written, or what does the test suite fail to cover?
Include the attacker model or scenario if relevant.

## Proposed resolution

A spec clarification, an additional conformance vector, or an RFC?
